title: Innodata's Blowout Q1 Earnings Ignites Massive Stock Momentum Spike
text: Innodata Inc. (NASDAQ: INOD) experienced dramatic momentum following exceptional first-quarter results. The company's Benzinga Edge momentum score surged from 13.12 to 95.88 week-over-week. The data processing firm reported a blockbuster quarter with revenue climbing 54% year-over-year to $90.1 million. Management secured a significant $51 million contract with a major technology company and raised full-year guidance to exceed 40% growth. Additional wins included a newly launched platform that immediately generated a $1 million contract and a fresh federal prime contract. INOD stock gained 80.75% year-to-date and 157.61% over twelve months, substantially outperforming the Nasdaq Composite's 13.08% gain. The stock closed Tuesday at $92.09, down 11.31%, though it advanced 4.66% in Wednesday premarket trading. With $117.4 million in cash reserves and zero drawn debt against an expanded $50 million credit facility, the company maintains strong financial capacity for sustained expansion in artificial intelligence data engineering services.
